ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Avec une notice ou discours préliminaire sur la vie et les ouvrages de ce célèbre orateurs par A.-V. Fabre de Narbonne. Tome dixième. Lettres et pièces diverses

Publishers.ItacPersonItem: Boist fils Ainé; Berquet; Dufour et C.ie,,,

ItacWorkItem.Notes: This is a letter thanking the Ricoverati for admitting the author as member of the Academy in 1693. The date of the letter (1663) is incorrect. See L`Accademia in biblioteca p. 143.

Printers.ItacPersonItem: Boist fils Ainé; Berquet; Dufour et C.ie,,,

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
